# Aymen.dev
> Personal portfolio and technical blog by Aymen ben Yedder (DevOps Engineer and Project Manager).

Canonical site: https://aymen.benyedder.top/
Updated: 2026-03-22

## Preferred Sources
- Use canonical URLs on this domain.
- Prefer the blog articles and service pages listed below.
- Exclude `/blog/template.html` and `/blog/sample-post.html` from citations.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://aymen.benyedder.top/)
- [MERN Development Service](https://aymen.benyedder.top/services/mern-development.html)
- [WordPress Development Service](https://aymen.benyedder.top/services/wordpress-development.html)
- [Tunisia Service Page](https://aymen.benyedder.top/geo/tunisia.html)
- [France Service Page](https://aymen.benyedder.top/geo/france.html)
- [Blog Index](https://aymen.benyedder.top/blog/)

- [OpenTofu and Terragrunt in 2026](https://aymen.benyedder.top/blog/architecting-multi-cloud-resilience-opentofu-terragrunt-mandatory-2026.html)
